title: Hello Hollywood a musical journey through the movies
description: GEORGE ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - The magic of...
bodyText:
GEORGE ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - The magic of Hollywood comes alive at the Market Community Theatre on Friday 10 October (19:00) in a brand-new musical showcase, Hello Hollywood.


> This production promises an evening filled with some of the greatest songs written for the silver screens, brought to life on stage with stunning voices and unforgettable melodies.


The audience will be transported back to the classics that defined movie history, from the sweeping romance of timeless ballads to the toe-tapping excitement of upbeat showstoppers like South Pacific, Annie Get Your Gun and Oklahoma.

Modern favourites that continue to inspire, such as The Bodyguard, Grease and The Greatest Showman, are included in the selection of music.

A talented cast of singers and musicians will pay tribute to legendary film composers and iconic songs that have won our hearts for decades. Tickets cost R120 and are available from Heather on 072 369 3304. - Compiled by Michelle Pienaar

Penny de Villiers (narrator)

Voldi George (tenor)

Phyllis Kriel (soprano)

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
